text: There is a sense of curiosity and quiet contemplation in my mind as I stand in these spaces. The first image feels transitional and empty yet expectant, as though something is about to begin or has just ended. In the second image, surrounded by thoughtful displays and flickering screens, I feel intellectually stimulated. The words I read reinforce a feeling of wonder at the interplay between memory, technology, and our longing for connection across time. I am both observer and participant, reflecting on the shared human experience in the midst of innovation.
